arts.ttl: Manchester United interested in loan deal for Paris Saint-Germain star that previously sold for €95m
arts.sum: Manchester United’s pursuit of a new striker has taken them to Paris Saint-Germain and France star Randal Kolo Muani, who could be made available for loan during the 2025 winter transfer window. Incoming manager Ruben Amorim is likely to be looking for a new striker during the first venture into the transfer market.
